case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Rechecked 1260-1440s emailservice metrics. Extreme mem deviations (+18k to +44k) persist, correlating with high latency.p90. Implication: emailservice memory exhaustion is the root cause.
